modules.module_title: Introduction to Security Guard Role & Responsibilities

questions.question: Ek residential society mein security guard ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Society premises ki suraksha aur safety maintain karna

questions.explanation: Security guard ka mukhya kaam society ki property aur residents ki suraksha sunishchit karna hai.

questions.question: Duty par uniform pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Professionalism dikhane aur pehchan banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Uniform professionalism dikhata hai aur security guard ko turant pehchana ja sakta hai, jisse unki authority aur role clear hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko duty par koi suspicious activity dikhe, toh aapka pehla kadam kya hoga?

options.A: Khud hi investigation shuru kar dena
options.B: Turant apne supervisor ya authority ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Suspicious activity dikhne par turant apne supervisor ya concerned authority ko inform karna standard procedure hai.

questions.question: Ek security guard ke liye punctuality (samay par aana) kyun important hai?

options.B: Duty handover smoothly ho aur security cover mein koi gap na aaye
options.C: Boss ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Subah ki chai peene ke liye

questions.explanation: Punctuality zaroori hai taaki duty handover theek se ho sake aur society ki security mein koi kami na aaye.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko apne kaam ke dauran kis cheez ki gopniyata (confidentiality) maintain karni chahiye?

options.B: Society ke security protocols
options.C: Kisi bhi incident ki details jo public nahi ki gayi ho

questions.explanation: Ek security guard ko residents ki personal details, security protocols aur kisi bhi confidential incident ki jaankari secret rakhni chahiye.

questions.question: Security guard ka main kaam 'prevention' hai. Iska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Crime hone ke baad usko rokna
options.B: Crime ko hone se pehle hi rokna

questions.explanation: Prevention ka matlab hai ki koi bhi galat ghatna ya crime hone se pehle hi usko rokne ke liye kadam uthana.

questions.question: Duty par hamesha alert aur vigilant rehna kyun important hai?

options.B: Taaki kisi bhi potential threat ya incident ko turant pehchan saken
options.D: Dusre guards ko dekhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Alert aur vigilant rehne se hi security guard kisi bhi khatre ya ghatna ko samay rehte pehchan kar us par action le sakta hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko apni shift ke end mein kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apni duty ki saari jaankari aur pending tasks aane wale guard ko handover karna

questions.explanation: Shift ke end mein proper handover karna zaroori hai taaki aane wale guard ko poori jaankari ho aur security mein koi lapse na ho.

questions.question: Ek residential society mein security guard ki authority ki kya seema hoti hai?

options.A: Kisi ko bhi arrest kar sakte hain
options.B: Unki authority society rules aur laws tak seemit hoti hai, police jitni nahi
options.C: Residents ko kisi bhi cheez ke liye order de sakte hain
options.D: Society ke bahar bhi logon ko control kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Security guards ki authority society ke niyam aur kaanoon tak seemit hoti hai, ve police ki tarah arrest nahi kar sakte.

questions.question: Security guard ko society ke rules aur regulations ki jaankari hona kyun important hai?

options.B: Apni duties ko effective tareeke se perform karne aur rules enforce karne ke liye
options.C: Dusre guards ko rules sikhane ke liye
options.D: Residents ko pareshan karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Rules aur regulations ki jaankari hone se hi guard apni duties sahi tareeke se kar sakta hai aur unhe enforce kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi resident security guard ke saath rude behave kare, toh guard ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Calm rehna, unki baat sunna aur professional tareeke se deal karna, zaroorat padne par supervisor ko inform karna
options.D: Unko society se bahar nikal dena

questions.explanation: Professionalism maintain karna zaroori hai. Shant rehkar, baat sunkar aur zaroorat padne par supervisor ko inform karna sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko apni physical fitness par dhyan dena kyun chahiye?

options.B: Emergency situations mein physically demanding tasks ko handle karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek security guard ko physical fitness maintain karni chahiye taaki emergency mein ve turant action le saken aur physically demanding situations ko handle kar saken.

questions.question: Security guard ko first aid ki basic jaankari hona kyun helpful hai?

options.B: Minor injuries ya medical emergencies mein turant madad dene ke liye jab tak professional help na pahunche
options.C: Dawaon ke baare mein janne ke liye

questions.explanation: Basic first aid ki jaankari hone se guard choti-moti choton ya medical emergencies mein turant madad de sakta hai, jo critical ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Ek security guard ke liye 'integrity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Hamesha sach bolna aur imaandaari se kaam karna
options.B: Sirf apne doston ki madad karna
options.C: Rules ko apni marzi se change karna

questions.explanation: Integrity ka matlab hai imaandaari, sachchai aur strong moral principles ke saath kaam karna.

questions.question: Security guard ko CCTV cameras ki monitoring kaise karni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf tab jab koi unhe bole
options.B: Constantly aur dhyan se, kisi bhi suspicious activity ko notice karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf apne doston ko dekhne ke liye
options.D: CCTV ko band kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: CCTV monitoring ek critical duty hai, jise constantly aur dhyan se karna chahiye taaki koi bhi unusual activity miss na ho.

questions.question: Agar society mein bijli chali jaye, toh security guard ki kya zimmedari hai?

options.A: Andhere mein baith kar wait karna
options.B: Backup power (generator) check karna, emergency lights activate karna aur patrolling badha dena

questions.explanation: Power cut hone par, security risks badh jaate hain. Generator check karna, emergency lights on karna aur patrolling badhana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko fire safety equipment (jaise fire extinguisher) ki basic knowledge kyun honi chahiye?

options.A: Unhe ghar le jaane ke liye
options.B: Minor fire incidents ko control karne aur evacuation mein help karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Fire safety equipment ki knowledge hone se guard choti aag ko bujha sakta hai aur bade haadse se bachne mein madad kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Visitor management system ka main purpose kya hai?

options.A: Visitors ko society mein ghusne se rokna
options.B: Society mein aane wale har visitor ka record rakhna aur unki identity verify karna

questions.explanation: Visitor management system ka uddeshya society mein aane wale har visitor ki pehchan aur unke aane ka reason record karna hai, security ke liye.

questions.question: Agar koi unknown person society mein enter karne ki koshish kare aur ID dikhane se mana kare, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Unhe politely rokkar ID maangenge aur agar ve nahi dikhate, toh unhe entry deny karenge aur supervisor ko inform karenge
options.D: Unki photo kheech kar social media par daal denge

questions.explanation: ID na dikhane wale unknown person ko entry nahi deni chahiye. Poilite rehkar rules follow karna aur supervisor ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Residents ke vehicles ko society mein enter karte waqt kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Vehicle sticker/RFID tag aur agar koi suspicious activity dikhe toh

questions.explanation: Residents ke vehicles ko entry dete waqt vehicle sticker/RFID tag check karna aur kisi bhi suspicious activity par dhyan dena chahiye.

questions.question: Delivery personnel (jaise courier, food delivery) ke liye kya procedure follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe seedha flat tak jaane dena
options.B: Unki entry register karna, purpose confirm karna aur agar possible ho toh gate par hi delivery karwana ya unhe escorts ke saath bhej na

questions.explanation: Delivery personnel ki entry register karna, purpose confirm karna aur unki movement ko control karna security ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Gate par duty karte samay security guard ko kis cheez ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Gate area ki continuous observation, logbook maintain karna aur kisi bhi unusual activity par turant action lena

questions.explanation: Gate par continuous observation, record keeping aur alert rehna security guard ki mukhya duties hain.

questions.question: Boom barrier ko kab open karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab bhi koi vehicle gate ke paas aaye
options.B: Sirf authorized vehicles aur verified visitors ke liye

questions.explanation: Boom barrier ko sirf authorized vehicles ya verified visitors ke liye hi open karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar koi resident apne car ka sticker bhool gaya ho, toh aap entry kaise verify karenge?

options.A: Unhe bina verification ke jaane denge
options.B: Unka ID card ya society app se verification karenge, aur agar possible ho toh flat number confirm karenge

questions.explanation: Sticker na hone par alternate verification methods (ID, app, flat number confirmation) use karne chahiye.

questions.question: Material movement (jaise furniture shifting) ke liye kya procedure follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi time allow kar dena
options.B: Society management se permission slip ya gate pass check karna aur material ki list verify karna
options.C: Sirf bade samaan ko check karna

questions.explanation: Material movement ke liye proper permission aur verification zaroori hai taaki chori ya unauthorized movement na ho.

questions.question: Agar koi taxi ya cab society mein enter kare, toh kya record karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Vehicle number, driver ka naam, contact number aur kis flat mein jaana hai

questions.explanation: Cab ya taxi ki entry par vehicle details aur driver ki jaankari record karna security ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Security logbook maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Sabhi entries aur exits ka record rakhne aur future reference ke liye
options.C: Dusre guards ko dikhane ke liye
options.D: Sirf kuch hi entries likhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Logbook records future reference, investigation aur accountability ke liye bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Agar koi unknown person gate par aakar bole ki woh resident ka 'relative' hai, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Resident ko call karke confirm karenge ki woh unke relative hain aur unhe allow kiya ja sakta hai ya nahi
options.C: Unhe bolenge ki khud hi resident ko call karein

questions.explanation: Resident se verification ke bina kisi bhi unknown person ko andar nahi jaane dena chahiye, chahe ve rishtedar hone ka daawa karein.

questions.question: Construction workers ya daily wage laborers ki entry ke liye kya protocol hona chahiye?

options.A: Unhe bina kisi check ke jaane dena
options.B: Unki ID check karna, entry register karna, aur authorized hours ke dauran hi entry dena
options.D: Unhe subah hi andar kar dena aur shaam ko bahar nikal dena

questions.explanation: Construction workers ki proper ID check, registration aur authorized timing mein entry zaroori hai, taaki unauthorized log society mein na ghoosein.

questions.question: Agar gate par koi bada jhagda ho jaye, toh aapka pehla action kya hoga?

options.B: Situation ko shant karne ki koshish karna, supervisor ko inform karna aur zaroorat padne par police ko call karna

questions.explanation: Jhagde ko shant karna, authorities ko inform karna aur police ki madad lena sahi procedure hai. Khud physical involvement se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Visitor pass issue karte waqt kin details ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Visitor ka naam, contact number, kis flat mein jaana hai, purpose of visit, aur entry/exit time

questions.explanation: Visitor pass par complete details honi chahiye taaki unki movement aur purpose track kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kya security guard ko gate par cash transactions karne ki permission hoti hai?

options.B: Nahi, security guards ko cash transactions se bachna chahiye

questions.explanation: Security guards ko cash transactions se bachna chahiye taaki kisi bhi tarah ke galat ilzaam ya corruption se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar koi emergency vehicle (ambulance, fire truck) society mein entry maange, toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Unhe normal procedure se jaane denge
options.B: Turant aur bina kisi rukawat ke entry denge aur rasta clear karenge

questions.explanation: Emergency vehicles ko bina kisi delay ke turant entry deni chahiye, kyunki unka samay bahut keemti hota hai.

questions.question: Aapko society ke gate par ek chhuta hua bachcha milta hai, jo apna ghar ka rasta bhool gaya hai. Aap kya karenge?

options.A: Usko gate par akela chhod denge
options.B: Bachche ko safe place par le jayenge, uske parents ko contact karne ki koshish karenge ya supervisor ko inform karenge
options.C: Usko kuch khane ko denge aur jaane denge
options.D: Police ko call karenge bina kisi aur action ke

questions.explanation: Bachche ki safety sabse pehle hai. Usse safe rakhna, parents ya supervisor ko inform karna sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Patrolling ka main uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Society ke poore area ko monitor karna, suspicious activities ko pehchanna aur security presence dikhana
options.C: Residents se baat karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Patrolling ka uddeshya society ke har kone par nazar rakhna, kisi bhi khatre ko pehchanna aur choron ko darana hai.

questions.question: Patrolling ke dauran kin cheezon par khaas dhyan dena chahiye?

options.B: Broken windows, open gates, unusual vehicles, unauthorized persons, aur koi bhi suspicious sounds ya smells

questions.explanation: Patrolling ke dauran har unusual cheez par dhyan dena chahiye jo security threat ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar patrolling karte waqt aapko koi band flat ka darwaja khula dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant supervisor ko inform karenge, aur agar zaroori ho toh flat owner ko contact karne ki koshish karenge
options.D: Darwaja band kar denge aur chale jayenge

questions.explanation: Khula darwaja security breach ho sakta hai. Supervisor ko inform karna aur owner ko contact karna sahi procedure hai, khud andar nahi jaana chahiye.

questions.question: Patrolling ke liye kaun sa time sabse critical hota hai?

options.B: Raat ka time aur early mornings, jab visibility kam hoti hai aur log so rahe hote hain

questions.explanation: Raat aur early morning mein security risks zyada hote hain, isliye patrolling is samay sabse critical hoti hai.

questions.question: Incident Report mein kya details honi chahiye?

options.B: Date, time, location, incident ka description, involved persons, witnesses, aur liye gaye actions

questions.explanation: Ek complete incident report mein saari relevant details honi chahiye taaki future reference aur investigation mein madad mile.

questions.question: Agar patrolling ke dauran aapko koi anjaan vyakti society ke parking mein chhupa hua dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usko approach karenge, identify karne ki koshish karenge aur agar suspicious lage toh supervisor ko inform karenge
options.D: Uski photo kheech kar bhaag jayenge

questions.explanation: Suspicious persons ko approach karna aur identify karna zaroori hai. Safety ka dhyan rakhte hue supervisor ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Daily diary (logbook) mein kya record karna chahiye?

options.B: Har shift ki important events, observations, handovers, aur any specific instructions
options.C: Sirf jab koi badi ghatna ho

questions.explanation: Daily diary mein har shift ki important jaankari record karna zaroori hai taaki continuity aur accountability bani rahe.

questions.question: Effective patrolling ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.A: Ek hi raste par baar-baar chalna
options.B: Random aur unpredictable routes follow karna, aur har area ko cover karna
options.C: Sirf un areas mein jana jahan log hain

questions.explanation: Random patrolling routes choron ko confuse karte hain aur poore area ki effective coverage sunishchit karte hain.

questions.question: Handover/takeover procedure mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Incoming guard ko pending tasks, incidents, aur any specific instructions detail mein batana
options.C: Apne saare saman le kar chale jana
options.D: Outgoing guard ka phone number lena

questions.explanation: Proper handover mein saari relevant jaankari share karna zaroori hai taaki security operations mein koi gap na aaye.

questions.question: Agar aapko patrolling ke dauran koi broken lock ya damaged property dikhe, toh kya karenge?

options.A: Usko theek karne ki koshish karenge
options.B: Uski photo lenge, supervisor ko inform karenge aur incident report banayenge

questions.explanation: Damaged property security concern ho sakti hai. Record karna, inform karna aur report banana sahi procedure hai.

questions.question: Kya security guard ko patrolling ke dauran apne assigned area se bahar jaana chahiye?

options.B: Nahi, sirf supervisor ki permission ya emergency ki sthiti mein
options.D: Agar wahan koi interesting cheez ho

questions.explanation: Apne assigned area mein rehna zaroori hai taaki poori society ki security cover ho. Special circumstances mein permission leni chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapko patrolling ke dauran society mein koi anjaan janwar (stray animal) dikhe jo khatarnak ho sakta hai, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usko observe karenge, residents ko warn karenge aur animal control ya supervisor ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Khatarnak janwar residents ke liye threat ho sakta hai. Safety ka dhyan rakhte hue authorities ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Patrolling ke dauran aapko kis tarah ki lighting par dhyan dena chahiye?

options.B: Har jagah proper lighting hai ya nahi, aur agar kahin andhera hai toh uski report karna

questions.explanation: Adequate lighting security ke liye bahut zaroori hai. Dark spots ko turant report karna chahiye.

questions.question: Security guard ko kitni baar patrolling karni chahiye?

options.B: Society ke rules aur supervisor ke instructions ke mutabik, usually regular intervals par

questions.explanation: Patrolling frequency society ki requirements aur security plan par depend karti hai, but it should be regular.

questions.question: Patrolling ke liye kaun se tools ya equipment helpful ho sakte hain?

options.B: Torch, whistle, walkie-talkie, aur notebook/pen

questions.explanation: Torch and whistle emergency mein helpful hote hain, walkie-talkie communication ke liye aur notebook reporting ke liye.

questions.question: Agar patrolling ke dauran aapko koi vehicle galat jagah park kiya hua dikhe, toh kya karenge?

options.B: Vehicle owner ko locate karne ki koshish karenge ya supervisor ko inform karenge taaki vehicle ko hataya ja sake
options.D: Usko khud hi move kar denge

questions.explanation: Galat parking se emergency access block ho sakta hai. Owner ko inform karna ya supervisor ko batana sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Ek achhe observation skill ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Details par dhyan dena, unusual patterns ya behavior ko notice karna, aur unhe yaad rakhna ya record karna

questions.explanation: Achhe observation skills security guard ke liye bahut zaroori hain. Isse ve chote se chote changes ya threats ko pehchan sakte hain.

questions.question: Fire emergency mein aapka pehla action kya hoga?

options.B: Alarm bajana aur turant fire brigade aur supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Fire emergency mein sabse pehle alarm bajana aur authorities ko inform karna zaroori hai taaki sabko pata chal jaye aur professional help pahunche.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko society mein achanak heart attack aa jaye, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant medical emergency services (ambulance) ko call karenge aur agar trained hain toh basic first aid denge, supervisor ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Medical emergency mein turant professional help bulana aur basic first aid dena bahut important hai.

questions.question: Evacuation plan ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ghar se bahar nikalne ka plan
options.B: Emergency mein logon ko safe tareeke se building ya area se bahar nikalne ka pre-planned rasta aur procedure

questions.explanation: Evacuation plan emergency mein logon ki safety ke liye banaya jata hai taaki sabko pata ho ki safe exit kaise karni hai.

questions.question: Agar society mein earthquake aaye, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Drop, Cover, and Hold On, phir safe jagah par jaakar gather hona aur supervisor ko report karna

questions.explanation: Earthquake ke dauran 'Drop, Cover, and Hold On' karna sabse safe tareeka hai. Lift ka use na karein.

questions.question: Basic first aid kit mein kya-kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Bandages, antiseptic wipes, pain relievers, cotton, scissors, medical tape

questions.explanation: First aid kit mein basic medical supplies honi chahiye jo choti-moti choton aur emergencies mein kaam aaye.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko chot lag jaye aur khoon beh raha ho, toh aap pehla kadam kya uthayenge?

options.B: Clean cloth ya bandage se direct pressure apply karenge khoon rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Khoon rokne ke liye direct pressure apply karna sabse effective first aid technique hai.

questions.question: Bomb threat ki soochana milne par aapka kya action hoga?

options.B: Turant supervisor aur police ko inform karenge, aur evacuation process shuru karenge as per protocol
options.D: Sabko bata denge ki bomb threat hai

questions.explanation: Bomb threat ek serious emergency hai. Turant authorities ko inform karna aur evacuation protocols follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Electrical fire (bijli se lagi aag) ko bujhane ke liye kis type ka fire extinguisher use karna chahiye?

options.B: Foam extinguisher
options.C: CO2 (Carbon Dioxide) or Dry Chemical Powder (DCP) extinguisher

questions.explanation: Electrical fire par pani nahi dalna chahiye. CO2 ya DCP extinguisher electrical fires ke liye safe aur effective hote hain.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko fainting spell (chakkar aakar behosh hona) aaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko letayenge, pair thode upar karenge, tight kapde loose karenge aur medical help bulayenge

questions.explanation: Behosh vyakti ko aaram se letana aur blood flow ko brain tak pahunchane ke liye pair upar karna helpful hota hai. Medical help zaroori hai.

questions.question: Natural disaster (jaise heavy rain, flood) ke dauran security guard ki kya zimmedari hai?

options.B: Residents ko warn karna, vulnerable areas check karna, aur emergency services ke saath coordinate karna

questions.explanation: Natural disasters mein residents ki safety sunishchit karna aur authorities ke saath coordination karna security guard ka kaam hai.

questions.question: Agar society mein gas leak ki smell aaye, toh aapka kya action hoga?

options.B: Turant gas supply band karenge (agar possible ho), sabko area खाली karne ko kahenge, aur fire brigade/gas company ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Gas leak bahut khatarnak ho sakti hai. Gas supply band karna, area evacuate karna aur experts ko bulana sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Emergency exits ko hamesha clear kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Wahan se saman nikalne ke liye
options.B: Emergency mein logon ko tezi se aur safely evacuate karne ke liye
options.D: Kisi ko bhi rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency exits ko clear rakhna life safety ke liye bahut important hai taaki evacuation smooth ho sake.

questions.question: Minor burns (chote jalne) par pehla upchar kya hai?

options.B: Thande, behte pani ke niche rakhna 10-15 minute tak

questions.explanation: Thande pani se burn area ko cool karna dard kam karta hai aur jalne ki gehrai ko badhne se rokta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi vyakti society premises mein gir jaye aur use chot lage, toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Usko uthane ki koshish karenge, chahe uski chot kitni bhi ho
options.B: Usko move na karein jab tak uski chot ki severity pata na chal jaye, medical help bulayein aur supervisor ko inform karein

questions.explanation: Gire hue vyakti ko bina soche samjhe move karna uski chot ko badha sakta hai. Medical help bulana aur situation ko stabilize karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ko use karne ka sahi order kya hai (PASS method)?

options.B: Pull, Aim, Squeeze, Sweep

questions.explanation: PASS method fire extinguisher use karne ka standard tareeka hai: Pull the pin, Aim at the base of the fire, Squeeze the handle, Sweep side to side.

questions.question: Agar society mein water leakage ho rahi ho jisse electrical hazard ka khatra ho, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant main electrical supply band karenge (agar safe ho), leakage ko rokne ki koshish karenge aur maintenance ko inform karenge
options.D: Residents ko warn karenge aur chale jayenge

questions.explanation: Water aur electricity ka combination bahut khatarnak ho sakta hai. Electrical supply band karna aur maintenance ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Emergency contact numbers (police, fire, ambulance) kahan display hone chahiye?

options.B: Security cabin mein aur society ke prominent locations par clearly visible hone chahiye

questions.explanation: Emergency contact numbers hamesha easily accessible aur visible hone chahiye taaki emergency mein turant call kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Residents ke saath baat karte samay security guard ko kis tone mein baat karni chahiye?

options.B: Polite aur respectful tone

questions.explanation: Polite aur respectful communication professionalism dikhata hai aur achhe relations banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi resident kisi rule ke baare mein sawal kare, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Rule ko clearly aur calmly explain karenge, aur agar zaroori ho toh supervisor se confirm karwayenge
options.D: Unko bolenge ki khud hi rules padh lein

questions.explanation: Rules ko clearly explain karna aur doubt hone par supervisor ki help lena sahi tareeka hai, jisse misunderstanding door hoti hai.

questions.question: Active listening ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Speaker ki baat ko poore dhyan se sunna, samajhna aur feedback dena
options.D: Sirf apne baare mein baat karna

questions.explanation: Active listening effective communication ke liye zaroori hai, jismein aap speaker ki baat ko samajhte hain aur us par dhyan dete hain.

questions.question: Conflict resolution mein pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Dono parties ki baat sunna aur situation ko shant karne ki koshish karna
options.C: Kisi ek party ka side lena
options.D: Supervisor ko bina soche samjhe bula lena

questions.explanation: Conflict resolution mein sabse pehle shant rehkar dono parties ki baat sunni chahiye taaki situation ko control kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Professional conduct maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Dosto ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Society mein trust aur respect banane ke liye, aur apni job ko achhe se karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf jab koi dekh raha ho
options.D: Apne personal kaam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional conduct se log aap par bharosa karte hain aur aapki authority ko respect karte hain.

questions.question: Body language communication mein kitna important role play karti hai?

options.B: Bahut important, yeh aapki credibility aur intentions ko reflect karti hai

questions.explanation: Body language, jaise eye contact, posture, gestures, aapki baaton se zyada impact daal sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar koi resident aapko bribe (rishwat) dene ki koshish kare, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Politely mana karenge aur turant supervisor ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Bribe lena illegal aur unethical hai. Turant mana karna aur authorities ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko residents ke personal matters mein kitna involve hona chahiye?

options.B: Bilkul involve nahi hona chahiye, jab tak ki security risk na ho

questions.explanation: Residents ke personal matters mein interfere nahi karna chahiye, jab tak ki koi direct security concern na ho.

questions.question: Apni shift ke dauran mobile phone ka use kis cheez ke liye karna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency calls, communication with supervisor, aur authorized security apps ke liye

questions.explanation: Mobile phone ka use sirf official communication aur emergencies ke liye authorized hai. Personal use se duty par dhyan bhatakta hai.

questions.question: Confidentiality maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Trust banane aur sensitive jaankari ko galat haathon mein jaane se rokne ke liye
options.C: Dusro ko pareshan karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Confidentiality residents aur society ke trust ke liye zaroori hai, aur sensitive information ko leak hone se rokta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi resident aapko abusive language use kare, toh aapka reaction kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Unko wapas abusive language use karna
options.B: Shant rehna, professional tareeke se situation ko handle karna aur agar zaroori ho toh supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Abusive behavior ko professional tareeke se handle karna zaroori hai. Personal attack nahi lena chahiye aur authorities ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek effective security guard mein kaun si quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Patient, observant, responsible, aur good communicator

questions.explanation: Patience, observation, responsibility aur communication skills ek achhe security guard ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Kya security guard ko residents ke liye personal favors karne chahiye?

options.A: Haan, agar ve tips dein toh
options.B: Nahi, kyunki yeh unprofessional hai aur conflict of interest create kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Personal favors se unprofessionalism badhta hai aur impartiality par sawal uth sakta hai. Isse bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Teamwork security operations mein kyun important hai?

options.B: Effective coverage, support aur quick response ke liye, especially during emergencies
options.C: Dusre guards ki galti nikalne ke liye
options.D: Apni zimmedari dusron par dalne ke liye

questions.explanation: Teamwork se security operations zyada effective hote hain, खासकर emergencies mein jab quick response ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Feedback ko kaise receive karna chahiye?

options.B: Open-minded hokar, us par vichar karna aur improvement ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: Feedback growth ke liye zaroori hai. Usse positive tareeke se lena aur apni performance improve karna chahiye.

questions.question: Apni duty ke dauran security guard ko kaun si baatein share nahi karni chahiye?

options.B: Residents ki personal jaankari, society ke security lapses, ya koi bhi sensitive information

questions.explanation: Confidential information share karna security breach ho sakta hai aur trust ko tod sakta hai. Isse bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek security guard ke paas 'arrest' karne ka adhikar hota hai?

options.B: Nahi, sirf limited circumstances mein (jaise citizen's arrest) aur turant police ko handover karna hota hai

questions.explanation: Security guards ke paas police jitne powers nahi hote. Ve 'citizen's arrest' kar sakte hain agar koi crime unke samne ho, lekin turant police ko bulana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Self-defense techniques sikhna security guard ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Apni aur dusron ki safety ke liye jab physical threat ho, aur non-lethal tareeke se situation ko control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Self-defense skills guard ko apni aur dusron ki safety ke liye madad karte hain, aur physical confrontations ko minimize karte hain.

questions.question: Agar koi vyakti society mein trespass (anaadhikrit pravesh) kare, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usko polite tareeke se bahar jaane ko kahenge, aur agar woh nahi maanta toh supervisor aur police ko inform karenge
options.C: Usko pakad kar band kar denge

questions.explanation: Trespasser ko polite tareeke se address karna aur agar zaroori ho toh police ko inform karna sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Local police station ke contact details security guard ke paas kyun hone chahiye?

options.B: Emergency mein turant police assistance ke liye
options.C: Unhe call kar ke pareshan karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Police emergency contact security ke liye bahut zaroori hai, taaki kisi bhi crime ya threat par turant action liya ja sake.

questions.question: POSH Act (Prevention of Sexual Harassment at Workplace Act) ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Workplace par sexual harassment ko rokna aur uske liye redressal mechanism provide karna
options.C: Sirf women employees ko protect karna

questions.explanation: POSH Act ka uddeshya sabhi employees ko sexual harassment se bachana aur ek safe workplace provide karna hai.

questions.question: Agar koi aapko duty par physical attack kare, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apni self-defense skills ka use karna (agar trained ho) aur turant police aur supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Physical attack ki sthiti mein apni suraksha karna aur turant authorities ko inform karna zaroori hai. Force ka use proportionate hona chahiye.

questions.question: Legal boundaries ka kya matlab hai security guard ke role mein?

options.B: Kaanoon aur society rules ke dayre mein rehkar kaam karna, apni powers ko exceed na karna

questions.explanation: Legal boundaries ka matlab hai ki security guard ko apne adhikar aur zimmedariyon ko kaanoon aur rules ke andar hi nibhana chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapko society mein koi illegal activity (jaise drugs dealing) dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant aur gopniyata se police aur supervisor ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Illegal activities ko turant police aur supervisor ko inform karna chahiye. Khud involve hone se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Use of force kab justified hota hai?

options.B: Self-defense mein ya dusron ki jaan/property bachane ke liye, aur sirf proportionate force ka use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Use of force sirf tab justified hota hai jab self-defense mein ya kisi bade khatre ko rokne ke liye zaroori ho, aur force ki matra proportionate honi chahiye.

questions.question: Kya security guard ko residents ki private property search karne ka adhikar hota hai?

options.B: Nahi, jab tak unke paas search warrant ya clear legal authority na ho, ya owner ki permission na ho
options.D: Agar saman bahar dikh raha ho toh

questions.explanation: Private property search karna ek serious legal matter hai. Security guards ko iska adhikar nahi hota, jab tak legal authority ya owner ki permission na ho.

questions.question: Child Protection policies ko samajhna kyun important hai?

options.A: Children ko pareshan karne ke liye
options.B: Children ki safety aur well-being sunishchit karne ke liye, aur child abuse ko identify aur report karne ke liye
options.C: Unhe playground mein dekhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Child protection policies children ko harm se bachane aur unki safety maintain karne ke liye bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Agar society mein koi minor accident ho jaye (jaise car bump), toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Involved parties ki details record karenge, incident report banayenge, aur agar zaroori ho toh supervisor ko inform karenge
options.D: Khud hi decide kar denge ki kiski galti hai

questions.explanation: Accident details record karna aur report banana future reference aur insurance claims ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Data Protection laws ka security guard ke role par kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Residents ki personal data (jaise visitor entry records) ko safely handle karna aur unauthorized access se bachana

questions.explanation: Data protection laws ke तहत, security guards ko residents ki personal jaankari ko confidentiality aur safety ke saath handle karna chahiye.

questions.question: Security guard ko kitni baar training aur refreshers lene chahiye?

options.B: Regularly, taaki ve latest security protocols, laws aur best practices se update rahen

questions.explanation: Regular training se guards apne skills aur knowledge ko update rakhte hain, jo effective security ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar koi aapko duty par kaam karne se roke (obstruction of duty), toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usko polite tareeke se batayenge ki woh duty mein interfere kar raha hai, aur agar woh nahi maanta toh supervisor aur police ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Obstruction of duty illegal hai. Polite tareeke se warning dena aur authorities ko inform karna sahi tareeka hai.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko apne kaam mein kis cheez ki high degree maintain karni chahiye?

options.B: Professionalism, integrity aur vigilance

questions.explanation: Professionalism, integrity aur vigilance ek security guard ke liye foundational qualities hain jo unhe apne role mein safal banati hain.
